schema_id.description: Canonical schema identifier for this block payload.

kind.description: Which gate system produced this summary.

generated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the summary was generated.

overall_verdict.description: Overall verdict, typically pass/fail/unknown or a governed enum.

latest_run_id.description: Latest run identifier (SIQ run_id / testing run_id).

counts.description: Gate/test counts as a small, renderable object (shape may vary by kind).

failures.description: Condensed failure list suitable for rendering in a Heap card.

primary_route.description: Recommended Workbench route for full drill-in (e.g. /testing or /system/siq).

log_stream_id.description: Recommended /logs stream id for tailing (e.g. testing_gate_summary).

raw.description: Optional full raw gate artifact for audit/debug. Renderers should collapse by default.
